Data.Name: Ione's Limb Case
Data.Description: A black shipping case packed with proof parts, coolant, and the identity chip the clinic wants back.

Data.Name: Cracked Continuity Chip
Data.Description: A cracked identity chip with Ione's old legal name and a body debt hash burned into the substrate.
Data.FlavorText: The bag says evidence. The clinic says collateral.

Data.Name: Limb Schematic Tablet
Data.Description: A rugged tablet showing an actuator map of Ione's current shell.

Data.Name: Purple Coolant Injector
Data.Description: A maintenance injector filled with violet coolant for overheated servos.

Data.Name: Iridescent Servo Grease
Data.Description: A tin of shimmering grease for dry ceramic joints.

Data.Name: Unclaimed Spine Coil
Data.Description: A segmented chrome spine left on the foundry rail without a name tag.

Data.Name: Amber Muscle Capsule
Data.Description: Synthetic muscle suspended in amber gel, still twitching under diagnostic light.

Data.Name: Nano-Suture Spool
Data.Description: Purple nano-suture wound on a chrome spool with a hooked needle.

Data.Name: Foam Ocular Case
Data.Description: Two blue optics nested in black foam, waiting for a face.
